text.title: multi-agent-collaborative Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for multi-agent-collaborative as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using the same agent instance as both a contributor and the synthesis coordinator.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The synthesis coordinator must be independent of all contributors to avoid anchoring bias. If one contributor is also the synthesizer, its own contribution disproportionately shapes the final output.

failure-mode.description: Communication overhead: agents spend more tokens on coordination messages than on actual work when iteration prompts are too long.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each iteration prompt grows linearly as other_ideas accumulates contributions. Cap the context passed per iteration to the most recent contribution per agent, not the full history, to prevent prompt inflation.
